name: portfolio-skills-step-collects-stack-and-years
description: Developer-niche portfolio user at WEB_COLLECT_PORTFOLIO_SKILLS sends 'TypeScript, React, Node, Postgres, AWS — 6 years'. Bot must extract the skills into websiteData.services (drives the tech ribbon + skills grid + technologies stat), pick up the '6 years' into yearsExperience, mark portfolioSkillsDone, and advance to the profile-links step.

websiteData.aboutText: Full-stack engineer who ships fast, reliable web apps.

turns.user: TypeScript, React, Node, Postgres, AWS — 6 years
